stemHtml: As for the Mass and Balance calculations, the "Index" is:

options.a: a figure without unit of measurement which represents a moment.
options.b: the range of moments the centre of gravity (cg) can have without making the aeroplane unsafe to fly.
options.c: a location in the aeroplane identified by a number.
options.d: an imaginary vertical plane or line from which all measurements are taken.
